notes: Iraq row/QID/photo audit 2026-05-24: verifier confirmed 33/34 rows match the live Wikipedia Iraq squad table and all QIDs resolve to intended Iraqi footballers. Dario Naamo DOB corrected to 2005-05-14 from Dundee United official profile and Wikidata support, while squad_table_date_of_birth preserves the table conflict. No additional clean Wikimedia portraits/P18/pageimages were found for the 19 no-photo rows; wrong-person Fahad Talib image for Ahmed Basil and deleted/no-permission hits were rejected.
